creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 154880
adding CPE information to Makefile (+ fix some whitespaces)

www/cocoon has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2003-1172). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0] and fixes some whitespace issues.

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
